title: Kai oi... 14 itan yperohoi!
actors: Kakia Analyti, Giorgos Pantzas, Giannis Gionakis
plot: To split into four equal shares the astronomical amount of 120,000,000 million drachmas, each of the four rightful legatees has to perform a difficult feat. All of them must be successful. Are they up to the task?
